name: codex-app
title: Codex Desktop Workbench
description: Official screenshot-informed editable Codex desktop app reconstruction, matching the light-mode project sidebar, active thread, composer, toolbar, review pane structure, and thin rounded icon language; pending sanitized live account capture. Desktop Codex demos that need a light-mode current app shell with real-product-like sidebar navigation, active thread, model/permission composer, toolbar controls, Git diff review pane, and local-work metadata, without importing Terminal, Claude, Finder, browser, Office, Figma, or Premiere surfaces. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.
